title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入瑞士：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入瑞士：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Switzerland CE-aligned and Swiss-adopted electrical-safety and EMC expectations, SNV standards route, ElCom market framing, Swissgrid interconnection requirements, fire and installation reviews, UN 38.3 transport and China baseline references.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与瑞士CE对齐及采标体系的电气安全与EMC要求、SNV标准路径、ElCom市场框架、Swissgrid并网要求、消防与现场审查、UN 38.3运输和中国基线参考的对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與瑞士CE對齊及採標體系之電氣安全與EMC要求、SNV標準路徑、ElCom市場框架、Swissgrid併網要求、消防與現場審查、UN 38.3運輸和中國基線參考的對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, Swiss market-access decision, SNV conformity determination, Swissgrid interconnection approval, fire-authority approval, or transport clearance decision. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Swiss and Switzerland-specific requirements with qualified Swiss professionals and local authorities before shipment, delivery, interconnection, and installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE适用范围裁定、瑞士市场准入决定、SNV合格评定裁定、Swissgrid并网批准、消防部门批准或运输放行决定。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、交付、并网和安装前应与合格瑞士专业人士和当地主管机关核实现行瑞士及瑞士境内相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE適用範圍裁定、瑞士市場准入決定、SNV合格評定裁定、Swissgrid併網批准、消防部門批准或運輸放行決定。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、交付、併網和安裝前應與合格瑞士專業人士和當地主管機關核實現行瑞士及瑞士境內相關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Switzerland, the practical baseline is CE-aligned compliance where Swiss authorities recognize CE via bilateral mutual-recognition, plus Swiss NIN/NEV electrical-rule alignment and Swiss grid review. The practical difference from China is Swiss 230/400 V 50 Hz profile versus China's 220/380 V market baseline for some products, with project-path requirements on fire review, grid interconnection, battery-safety evidence, and local commissioning.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口瑞士时，实务基线是CE对齐合规并通过双边互认机制被瑞士接受，同时叠加SNV/ElCom的NIN/NEV电气规则要求以及Swissgrid的并网审核。与中国不同点在于瑞士通常使用230/400 V、50 Hz市场配置而不是中国220/380 V口径，且消防审查、并网审查、电池安全证据和现场投运通常按项目路径分项执行。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口瑞士時，實務基線是CE對齊合規並透過雙邊互認機制被瑞士接受，同時疊加SNV/ElCom之NIN/NEV電氣規則要求及Swissgrid併網審核。與中國不同點在於瑞士通常使用230/400 V、50 Hz市場配置而非中國220/380 V口徑，且消防審查、併網審查、電池安全證據及現場投運通常按項目路徑分項執行。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs authority, dangerous-goods authority, fire authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
